luminousdust.config.title: Luminous Dust Settings
luminousdust.config.spawning.ambientRadi: How far away from the player (in blocks) dust will attempt to spawn. Keep this lower than Hard Cap.
luminousdust.config.spawning.ambientHard: The absolute max distance dust can exist. Particles further than this are deleted instantly. MUST be larger than Ambient Radius.
luminousdust.config.spawning.ambientBloc: Max dust particles allowed per single block.
luminousdust.config.spawning.minBlockLig: Minimum block light level required for ambient dust to spawn.
luminousdust.config.spawning.daytimeLigh: The minimum difference between Block Light and Sky Light required for dust to spawn during the day. Formula: (BlockLight - SkyLight) > Threshold.
luminousdust.config.visuals.ambientDustO: Base opacity for ambient dust (0.22 for vanilla, 0.45+ for shaders).
luminousdust.config.visuals.particleSize: Base size of the dust particles.
luminousdust.config.visuals.particleLife: Base lifetime of the dust particles in ticks.
luminousdust.config.color.tintStrength.d: How strongly colored lights (like soul fire) tint the dust. 0.0 = no tint, 1.0 = full color.
luminousdust.config.color.customTints.de: List of blocks and their hex colors for dust tinting. Format: 'modid:block_name=#RRGGBB'.
luminousdust.config.interaction.playerIn: Radius squared for player interaction (slashing or moving through dust).
luminousdust.config.interaction.breakPar: Number of dust particles spawned when a light-emitting block is broken.
How fast the dust shoots out from a broken block.
